visualizations.title: Scaling Equivalent Ratios
visualizations.description: Multiplication rule to scale any ratio by a non-zero constant k.

steps.explanation: The starting ratio in its initial form.
Multiply both terms by the same scaling constant k (where k ≠ 0).

visualizations.title: Visualizing Proportions: 1:3 vs 2:6 vs 3:9
